title: chrysocephalum apiculatum subsp. attenuatum
intro: Chrysocephalum apiculatum subsp. attenuatum, also known as Yellow Button or Button Daisy, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as colds, sore throats, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Chrysocephalum apiculatum subsp. attenuatum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and soothe respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments, making it a valuable addition to any herbal remedy collection.
